body:
## [3.35.0] - 2026-06-23

### Features

- implement auto-sync for orders to Odoo during payment completion
- Add general item settings and improve customer logging
- add initial tab provider for Phone POS navigation and update cart handling
- improve mobile layout handling and selection behavior in OrdersScreen
- enhance receipt handling with auto-print and SMS/email options in settings
- update config handling to disable ACK for internal transactions
- replace Icon with Text for dynamic MaterialIcons rendering
- enhance Agamento service with detailed logging and ACK handling
- implement multi-type machine payment with credit terms selection
- enhance Agamento plugin with improved command handling and service connection management
- add phone mode support in DevicesHubScreen and adjust settings visibility for mobile
- update bottom navigation to include menu button and adjust tab indexing
- implement dismissible cart items with quantity controls and product image badge
- enhance phone POS screen with menu button and scaffold key
- Enhance Nayax payment handling with terminal readiness checks and retry logic
- Add Agamento SDK integration for internal and external Nayax payments
- Implement phone-optimized POS screen with tab navigation

### Bug Fixes

- update localization strings for cash counting and tabs in multiple languages

### Other Changes

- improve code readability and deduplicate payment methods
- Refactor code structure for improved readability and maintainability
